title: pilosella cymiflora
intro: Pilosella cymiflora, also known as the alpine mouse-ear or lesser plantain, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as diarrhea and stomach ulcers, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pilosella cymiflora include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and supporting digestive health. Pilosella cymiflora can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and sometimes used in herbal remedies, such as tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
